testset.description:
flowchart TD 0:startevent:((startevent)) --> 1:task:(Receive customer requirements with at least 5 properties) 1:task:(Receive customer requirements with at least 5 properties) --> 2:parallelgateway:{AND} 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 3:task:(Order guide bar based on required length) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 4:task:(Order chain based on required width) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 5:task:(Order motor or electric drive components) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 6:task:(Order housing components) 2:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 7:task:(Order safety and control components) 3:task:(Order guide bar based on required length) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 4:task:(Order chain based on required width) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 5:task:(Order motor or electric drive components) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 6:task:(Order housing components) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 7:task:(Order safety and control components) --> 8:parallelgateway:{AND} 8:parallelgateway:{AND} --> 9:task:(Receive all parts) 9:task:(Receive all parts) --> 10:task:(Inspect all parts manually) 10:task:(Inspect all parts manually) --> 11:task:(Send first status update to customer) 11:task:(Send first status update to customer) --> 12:task:(Assemble first chainsaw) 12:task:(Assemble first chainsaw) --> 13:task:(Send second status update to customer) 13:task:(Send second status update to customer) --> 14:task:(Ship first chainsaw to customer) 14:task:(Ship first chainsaw to customer) --> 15:task:(Collect customer feedback) 15:task:(Collect customer feedback) --> 16:exclusivegateway:{x} 16:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Customer likes it| 17:task:(Produce remaining chainsaws) 16:exclusivegateway:{x} --> |Customer does not like it| 18:endevent:(((endevent))) 17:task:(Produce remaining chainsaws) --> 19:endevent:(((endevent)))
Receive customer requirements with at least 5 properties
:task
Order guide bar based on required length
:task
Order chain based on required width
:task
Order motor or electric drive components
:task
Order housing components
:task
Order safety and control components
:task
Receive all parts
:task
Inspect all parts manually
:task
Send first status update to customer
:task
Assemble first chainsaw
:task
Send second status update to customer
:task
Ship first chainsaw to customer
:task
Collect customer feedback
:task
Produce remaining chainsaws
:task
